title: Pibble Mod
description: The Pibble Mod adds pibbles to your world!
body:
# 📖 What's a Pibble? And what is the Pibble Mod?
The Pibble is a creature based on the hit trend on social media, they are also known as the Frenchie dog breed. The PibbleMod (currently in its early stages) adds a new entity to your Minecraft world! 

The Pibble being a breed of dog it is essentially acts like a vanilla Minecraft wolf.

This mod is very basic, but I do plan on adding to it soon!

# ✅ Features:
- Added Entity:
  - The Pibble
  - Pibble variants
    - Pebble
    - Washington
- Naturally spawning!
  - Pibbles will naturally spawn in your world
    Look below to see where they spawn:
    
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

PLAINS, DARK_FOREST,FOREST, TAIGA, OLD_GROWTH_SPRUCE_TAIGA, OLD_GROWTH_PINE_TAIGA


</details>



# 🤔 Why make this mod?
This mod started as a gag for a modpack I made for a server I am hosting with friends. I decided to upload it here so I can share its splendor!

# 📖 Usage and Dependencies
This mod is easy to install just add it to your modrinth modpack. Please ensure there is geckolib installed.

If adding the PibbleMod to your server please add the PibbleMod and GeckoLib JAR files to your server's mod folder.

# 🛠️ Compatibility
This is a Fabric 1.21.1 mod only and has not been tested on other 1.21.x versions.
